Function.Name: resetStartOfDay
Function.Description: Zeros daily accumulators and advances the day counter. Called at the end of each simulated day.

Function.Name: leaveReview
Function.Description: Leave a review based on the customer's wait time

Function.Name: updateArrivalRate
Function.Description: Recalculates arrivalRateMultiplier from the ratio of positive to total reviews. No-op when reviewsAffectArrivalRate is false.

Function.Name: getCustomerInterarrivalTime
Function.Description: Computes the time until the next customer arrival, in minutes. Generates an exponential random variate based on the current arrival rate. If the shop is closed (before dailyOpenTime or after dailyCloseTime), adds the remaining minutes until the next opening time so that no customers arrive while the shop is closed.

Function.Name: getCustomerServiceTime
Function.Description: Draws a service time from a triangular distribution scaled by worker efficiency. The triangular distribution is safe here because orders are processed atomically — no handoffs or interruptions that would require the memoryless property of an exponential distribution.

Function.Name: recordCustomerServed
Function.Description: Records daily metrics from a completed service interaction and triggers the review and arrival rate feedback loop.
